built: MOUVE Website (Next.js) — 22-route site launched at makeamouve.com, replacing WordPress/Elementor. All pages, forms, schema, tracking live.
Google Ads restructure — 7 ad groups with phrase/exact keywords, RSA copy (15 headlines + 4 descriptions each), sitelink extensions. Zero BROAD match keywords.
Meta WEBSITE campaign — 4 ad sets by vertical (Children's £8, Ladies £5, Parties £2, Camps £2), website conversion objective, Meta Pixel Lead optimisation.
Meta A/B Experiment guide — step-by-step Ads Manager build spec for destination test (form vs website). Locked creative (10 bodies, 5 headlines, 2 descriptions pulled via API). API verification step.
META-ADS-BUILD-SPEC.md — full API audit of source PROSPECTING campaign (4 ad sets, 4 ads, 30-day performance, creative classification).
improved: Google Ads emergency cleanup — 25+ negative keywords, brand ad group paused (£142/mo saved), catch-all paused (£133/mo saved), all URLs → makeamouve.com
GTM cleanup — 8 dead WordPress-era tags removed, phone call tag with wrong number deleted, remaining 8 tags renamed. Published v36.
GA4 conversion tracking fixed — dataLayer.push on all 4 Next.js forms, GTM triggers updated, 3 new tags (GA4, Google Ads, Meta Pixel). Live tested.
Dashboard v4.0 — full refresh: 9 stale tasks cleared, 4 projects marked complete, Dance Studio SaaS + Weekly Auto-Blog removed, dependencies updated.
decisions: Meta A/B experiment: clean destination test (form vs website) using Meta Experiments with randomised audience split. Same creative, same targeting, £6/day per arm, 14 days. Review ~18 March.
Pause all competing campaigns at experiment launch — PROSPECTING original + copy must stop to prevent auction overlap.
SEO & Geo project marked complete — WordPress-era fixes superseded by Next.js rebuild. GBP manual tasks are Louise's action items.
Marketing & Conversions marked complete — infrastructure done. Unstarted phases (retention, content, lead scoring) preserved in MARKETING-BACKLOG.md.
Party LP absorbed into main makeamouve.com/parties. Dance Studio SaaS removed (redundant with MOUVE Studio).
risks: Meta app in development mode — cannot create new ad creative via API. Must use Ads Manager UI for experiment build.
3 Meta campaigns targeting same audience simultaneously until experiment launches — auction overlap contaminating results.
MOUVE Studio still needs manual config before launch: Stripe keys, Trigger.dev, Supabase Auth, GHL webhook.
Budget project still paused — waiting on Xero data quality fixes.
